prose:
**Ethylene frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied ethylene structure (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz`, 6 atoms), used as-is for a single-point orbital calculation (not geometry-relaxed). SCF converged in 6 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.436 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, computed as LUMO − HOMO = −0.180 − (−7.616) eV). HOMO = −7.616 eV, LUMO = −0.180 eV. Derived Koopmans properties: vertical ionization potential 7.616 eV, vertical electron affinity 0.180 eV, electronegativity 3.898 eV, chemical hardness 3.718 eV, electrophilicity index 2.043 eV. Total electronic energy: −78.623 Ha. Integrity: trustworthy (energy finite, SCF converged, schema valid).</prose>
